name: Greek Cannellini Beans with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cooked and drained cannellini beans (or 15-ounce can)
14 ounces canned artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
14.5 ounces canned Italian style stewed tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large covered pot, bring water to a boil.
2. Add orzo to water and return to boil. Simmer about 10 minutes until al dente. Drain and add 2 tablespoons olive oil. Stir well and set aside.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sauté garlic and onions until fragrant.
4. Add carrots and bell peppers to the skillet and stir well.
5. Add squash, beans, and vegetables to the skillet and mix thoroughly.
6. Stir in dill, marjoram, and salt and pepper to taste.
7. Gently stir in the remaining ingredients (cannellini beans, artichoke hearts, and stewed tomatoes). Simmer several minutes.
8. Add orzo to hot beans and vegetables. Serve hot with a splash of red wine vinegar.
